    Società Filarmonica di Turriaco

Board

President: Andrea Baldo

Conductor: M° Fulvio Dose

Rehearsals

Band rehearsals take place weekly at the social headquarters. For information about days and times, please contact us.

Affiliations

The Società Filarmonica di Turriaco is a member of:

ANBIMA FVG

Associazione Nazionale Bande Italiane
Musicali Autonome — Friuli Venezia Giulia

Società Filarmonica di Turriaco

Founded in 1870, the Società Filarmonica di Turriaco is one of the most traditional wind bands in Friuli Venezia Giulia. Member of ANBIMA FVG.
